emails.subject: Re: Research allocation
emails.body: Re: Research allocation Becky, I gave the for EGM to Shirley. I assume she communicated this info to you already. I assume EGM includes F/X I/R (Gary Hickerson), weather, insurance (Jere Overdyke), oil trading and coal. For CALME I don't have any info. Let's split the cost evenly. Vince Becky Pham 11/02/2000 02:11 PM
